title: SQL injection via string interpolation into FromSqlRaw
evidence: var sql = $"SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Name = '{name}'";
proposedFix: Replace with EF Core LINQ Where clause or FromSqlInterpolated

title: Hardcoded production password in source code
proposedFix: Inject IConfiguration; store real credential in Azure Key Vault or user-secrets

title: Missing [Authorize] — OrdersController is fully public
proposedFix: Add [Authorize] at controller level; add [AllowAnonymous] to any intentionally public actions

title: IDOR — GetById returns order without verifying caller ownership
evidence: var order = await _db.Orders.FindAsync(id); if (order is null) return NotFound(); return Ok(order);
proposedFix: Add ownership check: if (order.UserId != currentUserId) return Forbid();

title: Newtonsoft.Json 12.0.3 — GHSA-5crp-9r3c-p9vr (CVSS 7.5 High)
proposedFix: Upgrade to Newtonsoft.Json >= 13.0.2 (minimum safe version per advisory)

title: Stored XSS via [innerHTML] binding of unsanitised user content
proposedFix: Replace with text binding {{ product.description }} or sanitize via DomSanitizer.sanitize(SecurityContext.HTML, ...)

title: Missing EF Core global query filter for TenantId — cross-tenant data exposure
SQL injection via string concatenation into FromSqlRaw
evidence: var sql = "SELECT * FROM Orders WHERE Status = '" + status + "'";
proposedFix: Replace with FromSqlInterpolated($"SELECT * FROM Orders WHERE Status = {status}") or LINQ Where clause

title: ASB-NS-1: Public blob access enabled on storage account — unauthenticated read
proposedFix: Set allowBlobPublicAccess: false. Use managed identity or SAS tokens for client access.

title: MIG-001: DropColumn — irreversible data loss on Orders.LegacyNotes
proposedFix: Verify column is unused; stop all writes in a prior release; deploy DropColumn in a separate migration after confirming no data at risk.

title: MT-003: No cross-tenant isolation assertion in OrderRepositoryTests
evidence: Assert.Single(result); // no Assert.All(result, o => Assert.Equal(tenantId, o.TenantId))
proposedFix: Add cross-tenant test: seed orders for tenant 2, query as tenant 1, assert tenant 2 orders are invisible. Use sql-multitenancy skill scaffold.
